codeReview.summary: The fix commit resolves both prior blocking review findings. PerformanceIntegration.test.ts now imports the production distanceSq utility and replaces the fake zone-transition scenario with focused integration checks against the real FogOfWarCore, SpatialGrid, and distanceSq behaviors used during transitions.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Importing src/utils/IsometricUtils.ts in tests pulls in src/config.ts and therefore Phaser constants; unit tests need the Phaser mock to cover AUTO, Scale, and Geom.Point for this import chain to work.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Fix commit 6c6ed10 had to extend src/__mocks__/phaser.ts with AUTO, Scale.FIT, Scale.CENTER_BOTH, and Geom.Point so src/__tests__/PerformanceIntegration.test.ts could import distanceSq from src/utils/IsometricUtils.ts. This test-import caveat is not documented in .factory/library/environment.md or architecture.md.

summary: Pass. I reviewed the prior failed review, the original commit 831e336, and the fix commit 6c6ed10. The fix removes the local distanceSq duplicate, uses production imports throughout, and rewrites the zone-transition coverage into meaningful production-module integration tests for fog save/load, spatial-grid rebuild, and post-reset proximity checks, which adequately addresses the original failures.
